name: hud_ui_container_add_child
description: HudUiContainer::AddChild appends a child to an empty or non-empty container, clears the child's next pointer, sets its parent, updates head/tail, and returns 1.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?AddChild@HudUiContainer@@QAEHPAUHudUiElement@@@Z at 0x4bc7c0 passed with zero unmasked mismatches, 0 relocation bytes masked, and 10 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows append-to-tail when head/tail exist, empty-list initialization otherwise, child next clear, child parent assignment, and return 1.
The native container child-list smoke validates head/tail linkage, sibling links, child parent pointers, and follow-on child-list operations.
